## Meeting Purpose

[Define Aida's role and identify blockers to scaling the team.](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Aida's role is a bottleneck; she spends \~10–12 hrs/wk on meetings and acts as a secondary QC layer for all clients, preventing her from owning a dedicated portfolio.](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [The primary QC risks are critical errors (e.g., citing fake data) and strategic flaws (e.g., duplicate keywords), which dilute client results and damage credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [Proposed solutions: formalize EM training, implement a CM/ME coverage calendar, and introduce a mandatory strategy review with Marcel to transfer his expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)

## Topics

### The Bottleneck: Aida's Role

  - [Aida's time is consumed by meetings (10–12 hrs/wk) and acting as a secondary QC layer for all clients, preventing her from owning a dedicated portfolio.](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [**Weekly Time Allocation:**](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
      - [**Meetings:** 10–12 hours](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
      - [**Strategy Dev:** 1–1.5 days for two clients](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
      - [**Content Editing:** 1 full day for 3+ clients](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
      - [**Topic Ideation:** Varies by CM/ME skill](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)

### The Problem: QC Risks & Strategic Gaps

  - [Aida's QC role is essential to prevent critical errors and strategic flaws that damage client results and company credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [**P0: Critical Errors**](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
      - [Citing outdated data (e.g., from 2015).](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
      - [Citing fake data (e.g., a PDF marked "This is not real data").](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [**P1: Strategic Flaws**](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
      - [**Duplicate Keywords:** Targeting synonymous keywords dilutes results (e.g., Hyper-Exponential case).](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
      - [**AI "Slop":** Unquestioned, confident but empty AI statements.](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [**P2: Refinements**](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
      - [Flow, transitions, and tone are subjective and can be iterated with the client without high risk.](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)

### The Solution: Training & Process Improvements

  - [**EM Training:**](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
      - [**William:** Strong on content strategy; needs training on keyword research.](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
      - [**Kathy:** Needs coaching on content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
      - [**All EMs:** Must understand the keyword process to advise clients credibly, even if CMs/MEs execute it.](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**CM/ME Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**Coverage Calendar:** Implement a system to ensure continuous coverage, preventing EMs from having to fill gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**Training:** Provide formal training on keyword research, search intent, and source verification.](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [**New Sprint Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create a forum for real-time problem-solving, enablement, and knowledge transfer.](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
      - [**Proposed Agenda:** Status updates, workshopping client signals, and live enablement sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
  - [**Marcel Review Gate:**](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)
      - [**Proposal:** Make a mandatory internal strategy review with Marcel a gate before client presentation.](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Transfers Marcel's deep industry knowledge and ensures alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)
      - [**Logistics:** A kickoff on Monday allows for an internal review by the following Monday, fitting the typical one-week strategy development cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ella:** Discuss proposed sprint cadence and Marcel review gate with George and Timon.](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
  - [**Aida:** Send any additional thoughts on the discussion to Ella.](https://fathom.video/share/zzoaeReoQJPLhSqByWpf3oYAzdWEBCVy?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
